title: Simply Epic Swords
description: Simply Epic Swords is an addon datapack for Epic Fights mod.
body:
By default Epic Fights mod recognizes all Simply Swords weapons as default vanilla swords. This datapack changes this. All weapons animations are changed as they should work and their "impact" value is added. Heavier weapons as the greataxe, claymore and hammer have bigger impact value than lighter ones like the scythe, cutlass and others.

This datapack requires both mods:

* Link to Epic Fights - https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight

* Link to Simply Swords - https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords





Link to my discord server if you want:
https://discord.gg/gJQA9WHe
